form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Sale over 435m. Top-three hope with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Sale over 435m. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when third (24.92) over 435m at Sale. Drawn close to the inside. Solid top-three prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when third (24.92) over 435m at Sale. Drawn close to the inside. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split and went on to clock 25.49 when a 0.6 lengths winner over 450m at Shepparton. Can make it two on the bounce.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split and went on to clock 25.49 when a 0.6 lengths winner over 450m at Shepparton. Can make it two on the bounce.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 5 over 425m at this track behind Over Achiever beaten 4 lengths (24.18). Racing well and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 5 over 425m at this track behind Over Achiever beaten 4 lengths (24.18). Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 425m in 24.27. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 350m at Healesville at Grade 5 level. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 425m in 24.27. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 350m at Healesville at Grade 5 level. Looking to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turning out of back straight.
Contacted lure after finish and fell.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time when fourth (24.20) at this track. Prior to that had been racing well. Has a wide draw to navigate and will need the right run to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time when fourth (24.20) at this track. Prior to that had been racing well. Has a wide draw to navigate and will need the right run to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head to inside soon after start.

form.formComment: Continued winning form with another impressive display after leading to make it back-to-back wins at Shepparton over 450m (25.12). Looks suited and should go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Continued winning form with another impressive display after leading to make it back-to-back wins at Shepparton over 450m (25.12). Looks suited and should go close again.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (22.73) over 400m at Warragul. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.
